title: PixelLoop: Shortcut Topological Navigation with Pixel-Level Loops
venue: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
excerpt: PixelLoop augments pixel-relative topological maps with loop closures, enabling shortcut navigation and improved planning efficiency in large-scale environments.
citation: Sarthak Chittawar, Vansh Garg, Aditya Vadali, Krish Pandya, Rohit Jayanti, Sourav Garg, K. Madhava Krishna. (2026). "PixelLoop: Shortcut Topological Navigation with Pixel-Level Loops." IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026).

title: MASt3R-Nav: WayPixel Navigation in Relative 3D Maps
venue: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2026)
excerpt: We introduce WayPixel navigation, a pixel-relative topological map representation that enables geometrically grounded navigation without requiring globally consistent metric maps.
citation: Vansh Garg, Rohit Jayanti, Krish Pandya, Sarthak Chittawar, Siddharth Tourani, Muhammad Haris Khan, Sourav Garg, K. Madhava Krishna. (2026). "MASt3R-Nav: WayPixel Navigation in Relative 3D Maps." Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation.

title: Towards Global Localization using Multi-Modal Object-Instance Re-Identification
excerpt: We propose a dual-path object-instance re-identification transformer that integrates RGB and depth information for robust object ReID and camera localization across varying viewpoints and environments.
citation: Aneesh Chavan, Vaibhav Agrawal, Vineeth Bhat, Sarthak Chittawar, Siddharth Srivastava, Chetan Arora, K. Madhava Krishna. (2025). "Towards Global Localization using Multi-Modal Object-Instance Re-Identification." Proceedings of the 2025 Advances in Robotics (Oral).
